purpose_context: Mission charter-end-user-docs-828-01KQCSYD has 10 fully-planned work packages covering gap analysis, navigation architecture, 14 new documentation pages, 5 updated pages, a validation pass, and a release handoff. This sprint mission runs those WPs in order via spec-kitty next, enforces pre-flight checks, and produces a single verified docs PR to Priivacy-ai/spec-kitty:main.
purpose_tldr: Execute the planned WP01–WP10 implementation sprint for Charter end-user docs parity and ship a merged docs PR to main.
